title: Mexotis galeottii
taxonomy: Mexotis galeottii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a member of the genus Mexotis, which is part of the larger plant kingdom. The species Mexotis galeottii is native to Mexico, where it can be found growing in the wild. Within the plant kingdom, Mexotis galeottii belongs to the kingdom Plantae, further classified into the subkingdom Viridiplantae.
